name: feature-naming-pulseiq
prompt: Our analytics app just added a feature that automatically emails each user a Monday-morning summary of their key metrics. Marketing wants to call it 'PulseIQ'. What should we actually name it? Give me options.
expected_output: Recommends descriptive naming over the branded 'PulseIQ' by default, evaluates candidates against explicit criteria, offers 3+ distinct options, and notes when branding a feature is justified.
assertions: Recommends or clearly favors a descriptive name over the branded 'PulseIQ' as the default, with reasoning
Evaluates candidates against explicit criteria (self-explanatory, say-able, collision risk, consistency with existing naming)
Offers at least 3 genuinely distinct name options
Notes when a branded name would be justified (a flagship differentiator) rather than dismissing branding absolutely
